steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ has slope $m$. A line perpendicular to it has slope
$$-\frac{1}{m}$$

steps.title: Move one unit right
steps.content: Line $l$ passes through $(4,7)$. Each answer choice has $x=5$, which is $1$ unit to the right of $x=4$. With slope $-\frac{1}{m}$, the $y$-value changes by $-\frac{1}{m}$.

steps.title: Find the point
steps.content:
Starting from $y=7$, subtract the change.
$$y=7-\frac{1}{m}$$
So the point is
$$(5,7-\frac{1}{m})$$
The answer is A.
